field.label: Name
field.help: Nebula CA name embedded in the certificate (required).

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional human-readable label stored only in the OPNsense model. Defaults to Name if left blank.

field.label: Curve
field.help: Elliptic-curve algorithm to use when generating the CA key pair.

field.label: Duration (days)
field.help: Validity period in days. Default is 365.

field.label: Networks
field.help: Optional CIDRs this CA is restricted to sign for. Add each as a tag.

field.label: Unsafe Networks
field.help: Optional CIDRs excluded from this CA's signing scope. Add each as a tag.

field.label: Groups
field.help: Optional groups this CA is restricted to sign for. Add each as a tag.

field.label: Passphrase
field.help: Optional: encrypt the CA private key with this passphrase. You'll be asked for it each time you sign. Leave empty for an unencrypted key.
